query:
DELETE FROM papers WHERE status='failed' OR knowledgeAreaId IN (
  SELECT id FROM knowledge_areas 
  WHERE name LIKE '%test%' 
  OR name LIKE '%quantum%' 
  OR name LIKE '%machine learning%'
  OR name LIKE '%federated learning%'
  OR name LIKE '%reinforcement learning%'
  OR id >= 180022
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3QQhaXF1ucYHpuK.e4b7c6254861 --database 25NeaJLRyMKQFYzeZChVTB --execute DELETE FROM papers WHERE status='failed' OR knowledgeAreaId IN (
  SELECT id FROM knowledge_areas 
  WHERE name LIKE '%test%' 
  OR name LIKE '%quantum%' 
  OR name LIKE '%machine learning%'
  OR name LIKE '%federated learning%'
  OR name LIKE '%reinforcement learning%'
  OR id >= 180022
);
